nonDurableBoundaryApiSurface.boundary: route evidence vocabulary projected from public reducer trace events for SQNT-03F mixed-target outcome rows
route owner vocabulary for one spell invocation's target/outcome/damage/projection route rows

adapter witness facts copied from SQNT-03F route connector; shared spend, shared Saving Throw damage roll, target, outcome, damage projection, and secondary projection facts are not durable BattleState fields
dirty target replay evidence only; records SQNT-03F connector row acceptance and selected level-1 damage spell pressure blockers

noRedundantStateFinding: Searched existing reducer route subjects, object/light route state, condition-rider state, next-attack-roll mode state, spell attack ordering, save-gated ordering, and selected damage spell adapters before adding fields. SQNT-03F facts are route/projection witness facts and can be replayed through BattleEntrypointTrace.route_events without a new durable BattleState field. Shared spend and shared Saving Throw damage-roll facts remain separate witness facts and are not collapsed into resource-spend state.
